name: @0xmmo/crew
description: Let Claude Code agents coordinate and ship multiple features concurrently — no branching, no worktrees. Auto-injects what your other running sessions are doing into every session's context, with agent-to-agent messaging via `crew send`; CLI included.

scripts.send: npm run build && git add . && (git diff --cached --quiet || git commit -am checkpoint) && npm version patch && npm login && npm publish
